latestHandover: 57 findings, 99 open tasks, 12 phases (2 PLAN + 9 IMPLEMENT + 1 FINAL). ARCHITECTURE: k3s on Windows 11 Pro Hyper-V (Intel i7-265KF/32GB/1TB) — homelab-as-production deliberate choice (hospital power grid, 500/50 Mbps fibre). Vault OSS: YubiKey USB-C PKCS#11 primary unseal + TPM 2.0 secondary. Calico CNI, kube-prometheus-stack, Loki, Falco, cert-manager (Let's Encrypt DNS-01 wildcard *.commonbond.au), Traefik, Cloudflare Tunnel. Slack-only notifications (2 webhooks in Vault KV). Edge Functions: git-tag versioning (fn/<name>/vX.Y.Z). Helmfile pins all chart versions with quarterly upgrade review workflow. ROUND 7 ADDITIONS: SEC-08 (High: k3s RBAC — default ServiceAccount is cluster-admin; Phase 3), OPS-01 (Medium: Windows Update restart policy + host reboot recovery checklist; Phase 1), SEC-09 (High: pgaudit extension for DDL/DML forensic audit trail, ISO A.8.15; Phase 7), ENV-11 (Medium: secondary backup to Backblaze B2 AUS region for data residency + provider redundancy; Australian data must not leave AU; Phase 7), CICD-09 (Medium: composite action for Supabase start + key extraction — structural fix for KEY-01/CICD-02 drift; Phase 5). STRUCTURAL CHANGE: PROC-01 moved from Phase 11 → Phase 2 (PLAN) — it gates Phase 12 branch protection and is a pure planning doc. Phase 11 now contains only ISO-03. PHASE ORDER: P1(PLAN:ADRs+Runbooks+OPS-01) → P2(PLAN:Helmfile+PROC-01) → P3(k3s+RBAC) → P4(auth fixes) → P5(CI hardening+CICD-09) → P6(supply-chain) → P7(env tiers+backup+SEC-09+ENV-11) → P8(CI arch) → P9(prod gate) → P10(docs) → P11(ISO-03 SoA) → P12(branch protection FINAL). DATA RESIDENCY: All backup storage must remain in Australia — Cloudflare R2 APAC (primary) + Backblaze B2 SYD (secondary). No EU/ENAM storage.
